ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the athlete belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete (e.g., Male, Female, Other) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the athlete */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the athlete */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the athlete in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the athlete registered */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the athlete */,
  "medical_info" TEXT /* Relevant medical information */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the athlete's profile picture */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of athletes in the team */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_captain_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., 100m Dash, Long Jump) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_rules" TEXT /* Rules and regulations for the event */,
  "event_referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lanes" (
  "lane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lane assignment */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the lane is assigned to */,
  "lane_number" INTEGER /* Lane number assigned to the athlete */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete assigned to the lane */,
  "seed" TEXT /* Seeding information for the athlete (e.g., NM for Not Mentioned) */,
  "lane_status" TEXT /* Status of the lane (e.g., available, occupied) */,
  "lane_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the lane assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lanes_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lanes_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the result is for */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete the result is for */,
  "lane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lane the athlete was assigned to */,
  "result_time" REAL /* Time result in seconds (for track events) */,
  "result_distance" REAL /* Distance result in meters (for field events) */,
  "result_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "result_points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for the result */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the result */,
  "verified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who verified the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_lane_id FOREIGN KEY ("lane_id") REFERENCES lanes ("lane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_verified_by FOREIGN KEY ("verified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Certification level of the coach */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the coach has been coaching */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the coach's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., athlete, coach, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "two_factor_auth_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if two-factor authentication is enabled for the user */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
